name: regular-manual-empty-plan
purpose: Semantic corner case: the empty plan is available and the start state already satisfies the goal.

name: regular-manual-vacuous-precondition
purpose: Semantic corner case: the precondition is false everywhere, so any available plan class satisfies the requirement.

name: regular-manual-single-good-class
purpose: The agent has one available regular plan class, and it guarantees reaching the goal.

name: regular-manual-good-bad-class
purpose: The agent cannot distinguish a good one-step plan from a bad one-step plan in the same automaton class.

name: regular-manual-not-strongly-executable
purpose: The automaton expects an action that is not executable from the precondition state, so strong executability fails.

name: regular-manual-unaware-good-action
purpose: The environment has a good action, but the agent's available automata do not include it.

name: regular-manual-agent-one-knows
purpose: In the same model, agent 1 has a good plan class.

name: regular-manual-agent-two-fails
purpose: In the same model, agent 2 only has a risky plan class.

name: regular-baking-good-method-positive
purpose: Baking case study: the agent can identify the adequate method, represented by a singleton good plan class.

name: regular-baking-confused-methods-negative
purpose: Baking case study: the agent confuses an adequate method with a bad method in the same plan class.

name: regular-robot-aware-safe-positive
purpose: Robot case study: the agent is aware of a safe action class that guarantees reaching the goal.

name: regular-robot-unaware-safe-negative
purpose: Robot case study: the safe action exists in the LTS, but the agent is only aware of risky behaviour.

name: regular-rescue-aware-route-positive
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: the agent is aware of a regular plan class containing exactly the safe rescue route.

name: regular-rescue-confused-routes-negative
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: a safe rescue route exists, but the agent confuses it with hazardous routes in the same regular plan class.

name: regular-line-positive-8
purpose: Regular positive baseline: the witness automaton accepts the unique line plan.

name: regular-line-positive-16
purpose: Regular positive baseline: the witness automaton accepts the unique line plan.

name: regular-line-positive-32
purpose: Regular positive baseline: the witness automaton accepts the unique line plan.

name: regular-line-broken-negative-8
purpose: Regular negative baseline: the automaton accepts a line plan that stops before the goal.

name: regular-line-broken-negative-16
purpose: Regular negative baseline: the automaton accepts a line plan that stops before the goal.

name: regular-line-broken-negative-32
purpose: Regular negative baseline: the automaton accepts a line plan that stops before the goal.

name: regular-automaton-only-size-positive-32
purpose: Automaton-only sweep: the LTS is fixed while the automaton contains additional unreachable states.

name: regular-automaton-only-size-positive-48
purpose: Automaton-only sweep: the LTS is fixed while the automaton contains additional unreachable states.

name: regular-automaton-only-size-positive-64
purpose: Automaton-only sweep: the LTS is fixed while the automaton contains additional unreachable states.

name: regular-automaton-only-size-negative-32
purpose: Automaton-only negative sweep: the LTS has a safe path, but the agent's automaton accepts only the risky action.

name: regular-automaton-only-size-negative-48
purpose: Automaton-only negative sweep: the LTS has a safe path, but the agent's automaton accepts only the risky action.

name: regular-automaton-only-size-negative-64
purpose: Automaton-only negative sweep: the LTS has a safe path, but the agent's automaton accepts only the risky action.

name: regular-class-count-good-last-2
purpose: Plan-class-count sweep: many bad singleton classes are available, but the last class is good.

name: regular-class-count-good-last-4
purpose: Plan-class-count sweep: many bad singleton classes are available, but the last class is good.

name: regular-class-count-good-last-8
purpose: Plan-class-count sweep: many bad singleton classes are available, but the last class is good.

name: regular-class-count-no-good-2
purpose: Plan-class-count sweep: all available singleton classes lead to a trap.

name: regular-class-count-no-good-4
purpose: Plan-class-count sweep: all available singleton classes lead to a trap.

name: regular-class-count-no-good-8
purpose: Plan-class-count sweep: all available singleton classes lead to a trap.

name: regular-all-good-mixed-class-positive-2
purpose: Plan-class-size positive sweep: one automaton class contains several distinct actions, all of which guarantee the goal.

name: regular-all-good-mixed-class-positive-4
purpose: Plan-class-size positive sweep: one automaton class contains several distinct actions, all of which guarantee the goal.

name: regular-all-good-mixed-class-positive-8
purpose: Plan-class-size positive sweep: one automaton class contains several distinct actions, all of which guarantee the goal.

name: regular-mixed-class-negative-2
purpose: Plan-class-size negative sweep: one automaton class contains one good action and several bad actions.

name: regular-mixed-class-negative-4
purpose: Plan-class-size negative sweep: one automaton class contains one good action and several bad actions.

name: regular-mixed-class-negative-8
purpose: Plan-class-size negative sweep: one automaton class contains one good action and several bad actions.

name: regular-language-width-positive-w2
purpose: Regular-language width sweep: one automaton accepts many length-d plans, and every accepted plan reaches the goal.

name: regular-language-width-positive-w3
purpose: Regular-language width sweep: one automaton accepts many length-d plans, and every accepted plan reaches the goal.

name: regular-language-width-positive-w4
purpose: Regular-language width sweep: one automaton accepts many length-d plans, and every accepted plan reaches the goal.

name: regular-language-width-negative-w2
purpose: Regular-language width sweep: one automaton accepts many length-d plans, but one accepted action can enter a trap.

name: regular-language-width-negative-w3
purpose: Regular-language width sweep: one automaton accepts many length-d plans, but one accepted action can enter a trap.

name: regular-language-width-negative-w4
purpose: Regular-language width sweep: one automaton accepts many length-d plans, but one accepted action can enter a trap.

name: regular-language-depth-positive-d4
purpose: Regular-language depth sweep: branching width is fixed while accepted plan length increases.

name: regular-language-depth-positive-d6
purpose: Regular-language depth sweep: branching width is fixed while accepted plan length increases.

name: regular-language-depth-positive-d8
purpose: Regular-language depth sweep: branching width is fixed while accepted plan length increases.

name: regular-language-depth-negative-d4
purpose: Regular-language depth sweep: branching width is fixed, but one accepted branch can enter a trap.

name: regular-language-depth-negative-d6
purpose: Regular-language depth sweep: branching width is fixed, but one accepted branch can enter a trap.

name: regular-language-depth-negative-d8
purpose: Regular-language depth sweep: branching width is fixed, but one accepted branch can enter a trap.

name: regular-awareness-positive-8
purpose: Awareness sweep: the safe action is present in the agent's automaton.

name: regular-awareness-positive-16
purpose: Awareness sweep: the safe action is present in the agent's automaton.

name: regular-awareness-positive-32
purpose: Awareness sweep: the safe action is present in the agent's automaton.

name: regular-basic-capable-unaware-negative-8
purpose: Basic-capable but unaware: the safe plan exists in the LTS, but it is absent from the queried agent's available plan classes.

name: regular-basic-capable-unaware-negative-16
purpose: Basic-capable but unaware: the safe plan exists in the LTS, but it is absent from the queried agent's available plan classes.

name: regular-basic-capable-unaware-negative-32
purpose: Basic-capable but unaware: the safe plan exists in the LTS, but it is absent from the queried agent's available plan classes.

name: regular-multi-agent-one-knows-2
purpose: Multi-agent semantic sweep: the queried agent has a good plan class.

name: regular-multi-agent-one-knows-3
purpose: Multi-agent semantic sweep: the queried agent has a good plan class.

name: regular-multi-agent-one-knows-4
purpose: Multi-agent semantic sweep: the queried agent has a good plan class.

name: regular-multi-agent-last-fails-2
purpose: Multi-agent semantic sweep: the queried last agent only has a bad plan class.

name: regular-multi-agent-last-fails-3
purpose: Multi-agent semantic sweep: the queried last agent only has a bad plan class.

name: regular-multi-agent-last-fails-4
purpose: Multi-agent semantic sweep: the queried last agent only has a bad plan class.

name: regular-formula-depth-positive-32
purpose: Formula-size sweep with fixed model and fixed witness automaton.

name: regular-formula-depth-positive-64
purpose: Formula-size sweep with fixed model and fixed witness automaton.

name: regular-formula-depth-positive-128
purpose: Formula-size sweep with fixed model and fixed witness automaton.
